rationale: Quarterly privileged-access review cadence per ISO/IEC 27001 A.5.18, SOC 2 CC6.3, PCI DSS 4.0.1 Req. 7.2.5. 90-day max age is the standard audit window before the evidence is treated as stale.

GDPR Art. 35 + EDPB guidance: a Data Protection Impact Assessment must be refreshed at least annually and whenever the nature/scope/context of processing changes materially. Block audit pack is the safe default because GDPR carries supervisory-authority risk.

Annual security and privacy awareness training is the cross-framework default (ISO 27001 A.6.3, SOC 2 CC1.4, GDPR Art. 39, HIPAA 164.530(b)). Mark-at-risk gives the owner a grace period to chase up overdue learners before the control falls out of audit-readiness.
